 {"id":"coding_agent_session_search-30qc","title":"T3: E2E Test Logging Enhancement - Comprehensive Structured Logs","description":"# Epic: Enhance E2E Test Logging

## Goal
Ensure all test runners emit comprehensive, structured JSONL logs following the unified schema.

## Current State
- Unified schema exists (test-results/e2e/SCHEMA.md)
- Rust E2eLogger implemented (tests/util/e2e_log.rs)
- Shell logger implemented (scripts/lib/e2e_log.sh)
- Playwright reporter exists (tests/e2e/reporters/jsonl-reporter.ts)

## Gaps
1. Not all Rust integration tests use E2eLogger
2. Phase-level logging inconsistent
3. Error context sometimes missing
4. Performance metrics not always captured
5. Mobile device tests lack detailed logging

## Approach
- Audit all test files for E2eLogger usage
- Add phase markers for multi-step tests
- Include performance timing in all E2E tests
- Enhance error context with stack traces and screenshots

## Deliverables
- All tests emit structured JSONL
- Combined log aggregation works
- Dashboard-ready metrics","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-27T04:21:33.780667740Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-27T05:36:50.849948862Z","closed_at":"2026-01-27T05:36:50.849879453Z","close_reason":"done","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
 {"id":"coding_agent_session_search-314do","title":"Phase 4E: Visual effects -- backdrop blur, text effects, gradients","description":"Leverage ftui-extras visual_fx and text_effects modules for visual polish. visual_fx provides backdrop effects (dim, blur, color wash) and CPU/GPU rendering adapters. text_effects provides animated text effects (gradients, fades, typewriter, ASCII art). Implement: (1) Modal backdrop dim/blur -- when any modal opens, the background content dims to 40% opacity with a subtle blur effect, creating visual depth hierarchy, (2) Header gradient -- the cass title/search bar area uses a subtle horizontal color gradient (ftui supports RGBA with alpha compositing for semi-transparent overlays), (3) Loading text effect -- while indexing, show an animated gradient sweep across the Indexing... text, (4) Agent-colored glow -- selected result item gets a subtle glow in the agents accent color, (5) Smooth fade transitions -- when switching between views (results vs analytics), cross-fade the content. These effects make cass visually stunning while remaining tasteful and non-distracting. All effects respect the performance degradation system -- they auto-disable on slow terminals.","status":"closed","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:20:31.852329888Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-06T07:57:31.882457248Z","closed_at":"2026-02-06T07:57:31.882435117Z","close_reason":"Content preserved in new 2noh9.4 bead: Animation + Visual FX infrastructure. Backdrop blur, text effects, gradients, alpha compositing merged.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-314do","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-1cyg3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:27:18.394654827Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-314do","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2luim","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:27:21.819646281Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
+{"id":"coding_agent_session_search-31ls0","title":"Harden pages deployers: dedupe Cloudflare uploads + skip symlinks in GitHub size scan","description":"Fix two deployment reliability/security issues: (1) Cloudflare upload path currently uploads duplicate payload entries when multiple files share the same content hash; dedupe by hash before bucketing/upload. (2) GitHub size scanner follows symlink directories in visit_files via Path::is_dir, which can recurse outside bundle or loop; use symlink_metadata and skip symlinks. Add regression tests for both.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2026-02-13T03:18:45.354451314Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-13T03:34:44.434293086Z","closed_at":"2026-02-13T03:34:44.434266757Z","close_reason":"Completed","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
 {"id":"coding_agent_session_search-327c","title":"[Task] Unicode Query Parsing Tests","description":"## Task: Unicode Query Parsing Tests

Add comprehensive Unicode handling tests to `src/search/query.rs`.

### Test Cases
- [ ] **Emoji queries** - `🚀 launch`, `🔥 hot`, multiple emoji
- [ ] **CJK characters** - `测试 代码`, `テスト`, `테스트`
- [ ] **RTL text** - Hebrew: `שלום עולם`, Arabic: `مرحبا`
- [ ] **Mixed scripts** - `Hello 世界 🌍`
- [ ] **Zero-width characters** - ZWJ, ZWNJ, zero-width space
- [ ] **Combining characters** - `é` vs `e` + combining accent
- [ ] **Normalization forms** - NFC vs NFD differences
- [ ] **Surrogate pairs** - Characters outside BMP (𝕳𝖊𝖑𝖑𝖔)
- [ ] **Bidirectional text** - Mixed LTR/RTL in same query

### Implementation
```rust
#[test]
fn query_with_emoji_extracts_terms() {
    let q = QueryParser::parse("🚀 launch code");
    assert_eq\!(q.terms.len(), 3, "emoji should be separate term");
    assert\!(q.terms.iter().any(|t| t.text.contains("🚀")));
}

#[test]
fn query_with_cjk_segments_correctly() {
    let q = QueryParser::parse("测试 代码 search");
    // Verify CJK terms are preserved
    assert\!(q.terms.iter().any(|t| t.text == "测试"));
}
```

### Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] All 9 Unicode test cases implemented
- [ ] Tests pass: `cargo test search::query::tests::unicode`
- [ ] No panics on any Unicode input
- [ ] Term extraction works for all scripts

### Verification
```bash
cargo test search::query::tests --test-threads=1 -- unicode --nocapture
```","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-27T17:23:59.502864770Z","updated_at":"2026-01-27T21:20:53.016645009Z","closed_at":"2026-01-27T21:20:53.016553479Z","close_reason":"Complete - 94 Unicode tests passing including emoji, CJK, RTL, zero-width, combining chars, normalization, surrogate pairs, and bidi","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-327c","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-335y","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:00:42Z","created_by":"import"}]}

 {"id":"coding_agent_session_search-32fs","title":"T6: No-mock unit test completion (fixtures only)","description":"## Goal
Eliminate remaining mock/fake/stub usage in unit/integration tests by converting to real fixtures and true boundary harnesses only. Achieve fixture-based coverage across search, sources, connectors, UI/TUI, and install flows.

## Definition of Done
- All mock/fake/stub patterns outside allowlisted true boundaries are removed
- Tests use real fixture data under tests/fixtures/
- no_mock_allowlist.json reduced to true boundaries + documentation only
- no_mock_audit.md updated to reflect zero transitional items
- validate_ci.sh --no-mock-only passes

## Notes
See test-results/no_mock_audit.md for specific file locations and recommended remediation.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"epic","created_at":"2026-01-27T05:46:03.470035826Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-27T06:47:33.042208578Z","closed_at":"2026-01-27T06:47:33.042133549Z","close_reason":"All subtasks (T6.0-T6.7) completed - no-mock test fixtures implemented across search, sources, connectors, UI/TUI, and semantic integration","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
